revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23368769069|time triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Uruguay%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Uruguay%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{Documentation subpage}}
<kbd>Country_data</kbd> templates are also available for each of the nineteen [[Departments of Uruguay]]:
{| style="background-color:#ecfcf4"
| [[Template:Country data Artigas]] || {{flag|Artigas}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Canelones]] || {{flag|Canelones}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Cerro Largo]] || {{flag|Cerro Largo}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Colonia]] || {{flag|Colonia}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Durazno]] || {{flag|Durazno}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Flores]] || {{flag|Flores}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Florida (Uruguay)]] || {{flag country|Florida (Uruguay)}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Lavalleja]] || {{flag|Lavalleja}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Maldonado]] || {{flag|Maldonado}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Montevideo]] || {{flag|Montevideo}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Paysandú]] || {{flag|Paysandú}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Rivera]]|| {{flag|Rivera}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Rocha]] || {{flag|Rocha}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Río Negro (Uruguay)]] || {{flag country|Río Negro (Uruguay)}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Salto]] || {{flag|Salto}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data San José, Uruguay]] || {{flag|San José, Uruguay}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Soriano]] || {{flag|Soriano}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Tacuarembó]] || {{flag|Tacuarembó}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Treinta y Tres]] || {{flag|Treinta y Tres}}
|}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||
}}</includeonly>
<noinclude>
[[Category:Country data templates of countries|Uruguay]]
[[Category:Country data templates of Uruguay| ]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
